title: Meiringspoort to be closed for half-marathon on 11 October
description: GARDEN ROUTE | KAROO NEWS - The N12 between...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"GARDEN ROUTE | KAROO NEWS - The N12 between Klaarstroom and De Rust, known as Meiringspoort, will be closed to all traffic on Saturday, 11 October, from 05:00 to 11:00.","html":"GARDEN ROUTE | KAROO NEWS - The N12 between Klaarstroom and De Rust, known as Meiringspoort, will be closed to all traffic on Saturday, 11 October, from 05:00 to 11:00."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The closure is to accommodate the annual Meiringspoort Half-Marathon."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"During this time, the route will be inaccessible in both directions.","html":"During this time, the route will be inaccessible in both directions."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Motorists are advised to make use of alternative routes:"},{"type":"list","items":["Willowmore route – suitable for all vehicles, including heavy motor vehicles.","Swartberg Pass – open to light motor vehicles only."],"ordered":false},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The Western Cape Department of Infrastructure urges road users to plan their trips accordingly and thanks the public for their cooperation.","html":"The Western Cape Department of Infrastructure urges road users to plan their trips accordingly and thanks the public for their cooperation."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Meiringspoort to be closed for half-marathon on 11 October
